description: A painting of a jockey mounted on a dark bay thoroughbred horse, walking on a green grassy field. The jockey wears a white cap and a green-and-white striped jersey. The horse is depicted in profile moving to the right, with a gleaming dark coat and alert posture. Behind them, dark trees form a backdrop at left, while a pale landscape with distant hills extends to the right under a grey-blue sky. The horse is rendered with careful attention to anatomical detail and muscular form.
